revision.comment: category description and non-diffusing tag
1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Non-diffusing subcategory|{{title year}} deaths}} '''People who committed suicide''' and '''events and topics involving suicide(s)''' in the year '''{{title year}}'''. {{Navseasoncats}}
[[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:{{title year}} deaths|*]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Suicides by year|{{title year}}]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:1910s suicides|{{title year}}]] [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]]

Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories

Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Uncategorized categories
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q104641273)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵}}" to ""
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Non-diffusing subcategory|{{title year}} deaths}}
{{title year}}
{{Navseasoncats}}
{{wikidata link|Q104641273}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:1912 suicides]]
[[en:Category:1912 suicides]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:sn_crud|TEST1912 suicides]]
[[Category:1910s suicides|{{title year}}]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]
[[Category:title year}} deaths|*]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=1912_suicides here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]

Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->

{{Navseasoncats}}
